## Test Categories

### Drive Blocks (4 blocks)
- Google Drive integration

### Integration Tests
- API endpoint tests
- Block chaining tests
- Common pipeline tests

## How to Run Tests

```bash
# Run all tests
pytest tests/ -v

# Run with coverage
pytest tests/ --cov=app --cov-report=html

# Run specific block tests
pytest tests/blocks/test_vector_search.py -v

# Run this report generator
python tests/run_tests.py
```
